input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8599 [Automation] java run fails for org.clojure:google-closure-library-third-party:0.0-1376; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The 0.0-1376 artifact is much older than 0.0-20250515-f04e4c0e and has different resource names/content, so tests copied from the latest version will fail unless adapted to the resolved artifact.

Some bundled JavaScript files reference core Closure modules via goog.require, but the third-party POM does not declare org.clojure:google-closure-library as a dependency; only add it if tests intentionally execute Closure module loading rather than inspecting packaged resources.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: The artifact is a standalone Maven resource JAR with no transitive dependencies; meaningful coverage can be reached by testing packaged Closure third-party JavaScript resources on the classpath without Docker, extra Maven dependencies, or environment/system properties.
